footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã thanh toán %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục thanh toán.' else N'The payment term %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã thanh toán %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The payment term %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_tt like rtrim(@ma_tt) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_tt) like rtrim(ma_tt) + '%')) begin select 'ma_tt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_tt)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_tt = $ma_tt.OldValue) begin select 'ma_tt' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_tt.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_tt <> $ma_tt.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_tt like rtrim(@ma_tt) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_tt) like rtrim(ma_tt) + '%') and ma_tt <> $ma_tt.OldValue) begin select 'ma_tt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_tt)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_tt = @ma_tt
